title: AutoRestEnable
description: Request body for enabling or updating AutoREST on a database object

object_name.description: Name of the database table or view to REST-enable

object_alias.description: Alias used in the REST URI path for the object

auth.description: When true, requires user authorization via ORDS roles before allowing access to the object metadata and data

run_mode.description: Set to 'codePreview' to return the PL/SQL code instead of executing it
